article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.12. CR - E-COMM Police Dispatch Services 2026-02-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on $7.3M renewal of Burnaby police dispatch contract with E-COMM
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to vote on renewing its police dispatch contract with E-COMM Emergency Communications for one year (2026), at an estimated cost of $7,300,000 — about $500,000 less than earlier estimates due to lower call volumes and cost savings.
briefs.action_required: No direct action needed — monitor the council decision if your business relies on police dispatch response times.
